component_spacing.scope: independent body components; internal parts of one table, card, figure, or grouped variant may touch or overlap as designed

selection_rule: Choose one body variant after deciding the slide claim, evidence shape, and density. Do not create new shell SVG files for routine content variation.

variants.best_for: 研究背景、文献脉络、问题提出、综合讨论。
variants.avoid: 多张图、复杂表格、四个以上平行要点。

variants.best_for: 一张论文原图支撑一个核心判断。
variants.layout_hint: Image occupies the left 58-65% of CONTENT_AREA; takeaway sits on the right or below depending on image aspect ratio.

variants.best_for: 一张图需要解释两个到四个区域、机制或证据点。
variants.layout_hint: Keep the image dominant; callouts stay outside the figure frame unless they are short labels.

variants.best_for: 已有研究 vs 本文工作、现状 vs 问题、方法 A vs 方法 B。
三到四个平行发现、意义、贡献、局限。
variants.constraint: Use 3 or 4 cards only. Split the slide if more cards are required.

variants.best_for: 材料来源、实验流程、算法步骤、技术路线。
variants.constraint: Use 3-5 steps; avoid paragraph-length step bodies.

variants.best_for: 变量指标、参数体系、样本清单、结果表格。
variants.constraint: Table text must remain readable at >=14px; split dense tables.
